title: How might we tell the pendency story behind DRISTI 2.0 in 3 minutes?
summary: A 3-minute animated explainer on court pendency for a general audience, based on PUCAR's research briefs.
body:
## About the work

A short animated explainer that makes pendency legible to people outside the legal system, completed and published in June 2026.

[placeholder description, this is a sample completed job to demonstrate contributor pages]

## What was delivered

- 3-minute animation with English and Hindi voiceovers
- Cut-downs for social media
- Open-licensed source files
